title: ONON Q3 Earnings: Co-CEO Marc Maurer Cites Zendaya, Olympics
text: On Holding Co-CEO Marc Maurer attributed Q3 2024 record results to the Zendaya partnership and strong performance at the Paris Olympics. The company achieved record net sales and profitability driven by strategic brand partnerships and global market opportunities. Maurer highlighted the importance of innovation and brand positioning as key competitive advantages. The Zendaya partnership provided significant brand visibility and helped On appeal to younger, more diverse audiences. The Paris Olympics served as a platform to showcase On's athletic performance credentials and innovation. These initiatives contributed to strong margins and revenue growth, supporting the company's ambition to reach $5 billion in revenue.
